name: octopass
description: Checks GitHub CLI authentication for the current repository and configured hosts.

octopass.hosts.description: Additional GitHub hosts to check with `gh auth status --hostname`. The current repository host is checked automatically.

octopass.checkIntervalMinutes.description: Minimum time before Octopass refreshes a host authentication check again.

octopass.checkTokenExpiration.description: Check token expiration metadata with a cached `gh api --include --silent /user` request.

octopass.showStatusBar.description: Show a status bar item for the current repository host.

scripts.verify: npm run typecheck && npm test && npm run build
scripts.vscode-engine: VSCODE_API="$(npm view @types/vscode version)" && npm pkg set "engines.vscode=^${VSCODE_API}"
